hero_subtitle: SFTY helps compliance teams aggregate wallet and transaction risk alerts into structured cases with automated escalation based on configurable rules and risk thresholds.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Alert escalation depends on manual handoffs
problem_description: Compliance teams struggle to triage and escalate KYT alerts quickly when provider outputs and transaction risk signals remain disconnected. This creates delays, inconsistent risk context and fragmented audit trails that weaken defensible compliance decisions.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY aggregates KYT alerts, transaction risk data, wallet activity and provider outputs into structured cases with linked evidence so compliance teams can triage and escalate alerts with complete context and auditability.
workflow_title: Alerts move into review and cases
workflow_description: SFTY routes KYT alerts through risk assessments, escalations, case creation and decision logging to deliver structured compliance review and audit evidence.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond wallet alerts. One escalation layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects wallet and transaction risk signals into structured alert triage, case workflows and audit-ready decisions without replacing existing analytics or KYT providers.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs managing alert triage with structured workflows, preserved evidence and bank-ready compliance packages within a controlled, enterprise-grade deployment environment.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How does SFTY support KYT alert triage and escalation
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how alerts escalate through compliance workflows
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how SFTY preserves audit-ready evidence for alerts

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for VASP compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides VASP compliance teams with a connected workflow that connects wallet risk, transaction monitoring, provider outputs, cases, decisions and reporting in one structured compliance layer.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY handle KYT alert triage?
faq_2_answer: SFTY routes KYT alerts through risk thresholds and internal policies to prioritize, assign, escalate and link alerts to cases for consistent and auditable escalation workflows.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves case history, decision logs and linked evidence packages so compliance teams can confidently review how risk alerts and actions were handled.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing KYT providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes, SFTY connects multiple KYT providers’ outputs into one platform without replacing them, enabling orchestration and consolidated alert triage.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYT or Travel Rule providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY sits above KYT and Travel Rule providers and structures their outputs into connected workflows without replacing the underlying services.
final_title: Bring KYT alerts into structured escalation workflows
final_description: Review how SFTY connects wallet risk and transaction alerts into controlled case workflows with configurable escalation rules and audit evidence.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.

footer_legal_notice: This page is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal, regulatory or compliance advice. SFTY deployment depends on jurisdiction, client requirements and applicable laws.
